_comment: Fiesta headless game-client configuration. Loaded by SVC_FIESTA via ElleConfig dot-path keys (fiesta.host, fiesta.port, ...). Drop this file into Deploy/Configs/ alongside the other service configs and the master ElleAnn config will merge it. Sensitive credentials should NOT be committed; populate username/password in your local copy only.

fiesta._protocol_notes: Standard FiestaPS framing: u8 sizeFlag (0xFF → next u16 LE is real length), u16 LE opcode, payload. Stream cipher is XOR against a 32-byte session key delivered in the LOGIN_REPLY tail. Override opcodes in FiestaPacket.h::Op if your target server build diverges from the documented JFOL/CN map.
